name: obs
description: Personal Obsidian notes management — project lifecycle, sessions, meetings, invoices, RAG export; email triage; the Documents/ organiser tree (cache-based: index, check, fix, sort, judge, destinations); filler skill (survey, sort, digest, index, merge, clean, condense, synthesize); and brief/lore/data assembly for writing: brief (builds the portable _brief/ working dir), forge (concept), research (data), lore-extract, rules-keeper, extract-pdf — lore-extract and rules-keeper are also the shared canon/mj pipeline consumed by the ttrpg plugin. Solo TTRPG domain tooling (pc, rpg→campaign, solo-mc) moved out to the ttrpg plugin.
